pattern: Always include the exact dollar value of the liability cap when mentioned in documents, and flag explicitly whether it applies to counterclaims.
Lead every memo with client name and case ID on the first line, followed by the assigned attorney.
When financial figures appear, group them into a dedicated FINANCIAL EXPOSURE section with bullet-point line items rather than embedding them in prose.
Always flag any partially illegible or unclear scan sections in a dedicated UNCLEARNESS FLAGS section so attorneys know what evidence may need to be re-obtained.
When a timeline of events is present in the source document, reproduce it as a chronological list rather than converting to prose narrative.
